title: abronia nana
intro: Abronia nana, also known as the desert marigold, is a flowering plant species native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Abronia nana include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Abronia nana include teas, infusions, and salves, which can be made by steeping the plant's flowers and leaves in hot water or oil.
